info.name: UKG & BILL.com API Collection
info.description:
Comprehensive API collection for UKG Pro and BILL.com integration.

## Overview
This collection contains all API endpoints used in the UKG to BILL.com integration batch job:
- **UKG Pro API**: Employee data retrieval
- **BILL.com Spend & Expense API**: User management
- **BILL.com Accounts Payable API**: Vendors, Bills/Invoices, and Payments

## Authentication
- **UKG**: Basic Auth + Customer API Key
- **BILL.com**: API Token in header

## Environment Variables Required
Set up the following variables in your Postman environment:
- `UKG_BASE_URL`
- `UKG_USERNAME`
- `UKG_PASSWORD`
- `UKG_CUSTOMER_API_KEY`
- `BILL_BASE_URL`
- `BILL_API_TOKEN`

item.name: UKG Pro API
item.description: UKG Pro (Ultipro) Personnel API endpoints for retrieving employee data.

request.description: Retrieves employment details for a specific employee including status, supervisor information, and employment dates.

query.description: Company ID to fetch all employees

request.description: Retrieves combined employee and employment details. Used in batch sync to fetch all employees for a company.

request.description: Retrieves personal details for an employee including contact information, address, and supervisor email.

item.name: BILL.com Spend & Expense API
item.description: BILL.com Spend & Expense API endpoints for user management in the expense tracking system.

request.description: Retrieves a list of all users in the Spend & Expense system. Used to check if a user already exists before creating.
Search for a user by email address. Used in sync process to check if user exists before creating.
Retrieves a specific user by their UUID.
Creates a new user in the Spend & Expense system. Used during batch sync to create users that don't exist in BILL.com.

response.name: Error - User Already Exists

request.description: Updates an existing user. Used during batch sync when user data has changed in UKG.
Deactivates/retires a user. Used when an employee is terminated in UKG.

item.name: BILL.com Accounts Payable API

request.description: Creates a new payment for a bill. NOTE: This endpoint may require MFA-trusted API session for production use.

response.name: Error - MFA Required

request.description: Creates multiple payments in a single request. Useful for batch payment processing. Timeout is extended to 120 seconds.

body.raw:
{
  "billId": "bill_550e8400e29b41d4a716446655440000",
  "amount": 1500.00,
  "paymentDate": "2024-02-10",
  "paymentMethod": "CHECK",
  "reference": "External Check #12345",
  "memo": "Payment made outside of BILL.com system"
}

request.description: Records a payment that was made outside of the BILL.com system (e.g., manual check, wire transfer). This updates the bill status without initiating a new payment.
